segments.text: He had the explosive flame forcing the airdodge
The Game and Watch has such a good recovery, that's really hard
He's just grabbing the ledge people!
He's just standing there menacingly, he's just waiting for the right moment to attack
And it worked actually, Raflow, he got the hit but sadly
Now the trades are looking against him
Going here, going deep for the back air, he was in the right spot, up B
I think that's it, going up high but the Kawam again
And that's gonna do it, the turtle

full_text: He had the explosive flame forcing the airdodge The Game and Watch has such a good recovery, that's really hard He's just grabbing the ledge people! He's just standing there menacingly, he's just waiting for the right moment to attack And it worked actually, Raflow, he got the hit but sadly Now the trades are looking against him Going here, going deep for the back air, he was in the right spot, up B I think that's it, going up high but the Kawam again And that's gonna do it, the turtle
